title: Emotecraft Recording Addon
description: Record Emotecraft emotes using Flashback or Replay Mod using this compatibility addon.
body: This is a simple compatibility mod that makes [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) work with [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) or [Replay Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod). After you install the mod the replays should record and playback emotes with no additional setup required. **NOTE: Only use EITHER Flashback OR ReplayMod, NOT BOTH at the same time!** If you encounter any issues feel free to report them. Thanks to the Emotecraft dev [dima-dencep](https://github.com/dima-dencep) for helping out with the networking solution and [del1tme](https://modrinth.com/user/del1tme) for contacting them. Shout out to **del1tme's server**!
